hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】市场预计沃什美联储将比预期更加鹰派；【FINANCE】杰弗里·冈拉克 (Jeffrey Gundlach) 表示，美联储的沃什不会成为许多人希望的“轻松赚钱”主席；【FINANCE】由于几位成员暗示 2026 年加息，主席沃什放弃给出利率预测。

items.title: Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected
items.summary: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's tough talk on inflation Wednesday reverberated through financial markets.
items.title_zh: 市场预计沃什美联储将比预期更加鹰派
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什周三关于通胀的强硬言论在金融市场引起反响。

items.title: Jeffrey Gundlach says Fed's Warsh is not going to be the 'easy money' chairman many hoped for
items.summary: Gundlach said Warsh's stance reduces the risk of overly accommodative monetary policy that could reignite inflation and push longer-term borrowing costs higher.
items.title_zh: 杰弗里·冈拉克 (Jeffrey Gundlach) 表示，美联储的沃什不会成为许多人希望的“轻松赚钱”主席
items.summary_zh: 冈拉克表示，沃什的立场降低了过度宽松货币政策的风险，这种政策可能会重新引发通胀并推高长期借贷成本。

items.title: Chairman Warsh abstains from giving rate forecast as several members signal a hike in 2026
items.summary: The median projection called for the federal funds rate to end 2026 at 3.8%, a quarter percentage point above the current target range.
items.title_zh: 由于几位成员暗示 2026 年加息，主席沃什放弃给出利率预测
items.summary_zh: 预计联邦基金利率到 2026 年底将达到 3.8%，比当前目标范围高出四分之一个百分点。

items.title: Chairman Warsh drastically alters Fed rate statement. Here's what's changed
items.summary: This is a comparison of Wednesday's Federal Open Market Committee statement with the one issued after the Fed's previous policymaking meeting in April.
items.title_zh: 主席沃什大幅改变了美联储的利率声明。这是更改的内容
items.summary_zh: 这是周三联邦公开市场委员会声明与美联储 4 月份上一次政策制定会议后发布的声明的比较。

items.title: Bitcoin holds near $64,000 as a renewed Hormuz threat clouds US-Iran ceasefire talks
items.summary: Crypto firmed over the weekend after Friday's sell-off, with bitcoin recovering toward $64,000. Permanent ceasefire talks open in Switzerland, but Iran's order to close the Strait of Hormuz again revives the risk the deal was meant to settle.
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹威胁再次笼罩美伊停火谈判，比特币维持在 64,000 美元附近
items.summary_zh: 在周五的抛售之后，加密货币在周末走强，比特币回升至 64,000 美元。永久停火谈判在瑞士开启，但伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡的命令再次引发了该协议本应解决的风险。

items.title: Franklin Templeton proposes new ETFs that turn corporate dividends into bitcoin
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for June 19, 2026
items.title_zh: 富兰克林邓普顿提出新的 ETF，将公司股息转化为比特币
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 6 月 19 日天气预报

items.title: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
items.summary: The first big announced changes point toward a quiet revolution, with task forces set up to rethink virtually everything done at the Fed.
items.title_zh: “政权更迭，但戴着丝绒手套”：凯文·沃什如何着手重塑美联储
items.summary_zh: 第一个宣布的重大变化预示着一场悄然的革命，成立了特别工作组来重新思考美联储所做的几乎所有事情。

items.title: Fed holds rates steady, pares down statement to remove cutting bias
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its interest rate decision.
items.title_zh: 美联储维持利率稳定，削减声明以消除降息偏见
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三公布了利率决定。

items.title: Half of France under red heat alert as alcohol banned at street music festival
items.summary: Temperatures are forecast to peak on Monday, and authorities warn they could match historic highs.
items.title_zh: 街头音乐节禁止饮酒，半个法国处于红热警报状态
items.summary_zh: 预计气温将于周一达到峰值，当局警告称，气温可能会达到历史最高水平。

items.title: Ethereum's biggest 'sandwich' bot drained of $7.5 million in ironic exploit
items.summary: Blockaid said an attacker tricked Jaredfromsubway.eth into approving fake trading routes, then used those approvals to drain WETH, USDC and USDT.
items.title_zh: 以太坊最大的“三明治”机器人因讽刺性漏洞被盗走 750 万美元
items.summary_zh: Blockaid 表示，攻击者欺骗 Jaredfromsubway.eth 批准虚假交易路线，然后利用这些批准来耗尽 WETH、USDC 和 USDT。

items.title: How STRC lost its par: The timeline behind Strategy's preferred-stock meltdown
items.summary: From a bond buyback and dwindling cash reserves to a bitcoin bear market, the sequence of events that turned STRC's par-value challenge into a marketwide debate.
items.title_zh: STRC 如何失去其面值：Strategy 优先股崩溃背后的时间表
items.summary_zh: 从债券回购和现金储备减少到比特币熊市，这一系列事件将 STRC 的票面价值挑战变成了市场范围内的辩论。

items.title: GoMining challenges Jack Dorsey's Square with payments system designed around bitcoin
items.summary: GoMining unveiled a software development kit and programmable access for its bitcoin payment protocol GoBTC Pay, allowing merchants to accept BTC for everyday purchases.
items.title_zh: GoMining 用围绕比特币设计的支付系统挑战 Jack Dorsey's Square
items.summary_zh: GoMining 推出了比特币支付协议 GoBTC Pay 的软件开发套件和可编程访问权限，允许商家接受 BTC 进行日常购物。

items.title: Smart-contract and DeFi coins lead losses as bitcoin wilts for 4th straight day
items.summary: Concerns about STRC, the dividend-paying preferred stock from Strategy continue to dominate market sentiment.
items.title_zh: 比特币连续第四天下跌，智能合约和 DeFi 代币领跌
items.summary_zh: 对Strategy公司派息优先股STRC的担忧继续主导市场情绪。

items.title: Ethereum could face core development ‘funding crisis’ within nine months, says former EF contributor
items.summary: Former EF contributor VanEpps warned Ethereum could face a core development funding crisis within 3-9 months after CIP expired.
items.title_zh: 前 EF 撰稿人表示，以太坊可能在九个月内面临核心开发“资金危机”
items.summary_zh: 前 EF 撰稿人 VanEpps 警告称，以太坊可能在 CIP 到期后 3-9 个月内面临核心开发资金危机。

items.title: Franklin Templeton files for ETFs that reinvest stock dividends into bitcoin
items.summary: Franklin has filed for two new ETFs that would reinvest stock dividends into BTC, with an expected effective date as early as Sept. 1, 2026.
items.title_zh: 富兰克林邓普顿申请将股票股息再投资于比特币的 ETF
items.summary_zh: 富兰克林已申请两只新的 ETF，将股票股息再投资于 BTC，预计生效日期最早将于 2026 年 9 月 1 日生效。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 合作伙伴网络简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出合作伙伴网络，投资 1.5 亿美元帮助全球合作伙伴加速企业人工智能的采用、部署和转型。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.title_zh: Preply 如何结合人工智能和真人导师来实现个性化学习
items.summary_zh: Preply 使用 OpenAI 推出人工智能生成的课程摘要，提供个性化反馈和语言学习练习。

items.title: MIT’s Initiative for New Manufacturing builds momentum
items.summary: In its first year, INM has worked across research, workforce development, and industry engagement to help accelerate new manufacturing technologies and their real-world deployment.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新制造倡议蓄势待发
items.summary_zh: 在成立的第一年，INM 致力于研究、劳动力发展和行业参与，以帮助加速新制造技术及其在现实世界的部署。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: U.S. and Iran begin peace talks amid conflicting claims over Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Iran's military said it had closed the Strait of Hormuz in response to continued Israeli military strikes in Lebanon; the U.S. said it remains open.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡主权争议中开始和平谈判
items.summary_zh: 伊朗军方表示，已关闭霍尔木兹海峡，以回应以色列对黎巴嫩的持续军事打击；美国表示仍保持开放。

items.title: The riskiest SpaceX stock trade of all had a big first week
items.summary: SpaceX's IPO did not just mint the biggest debut in market history and a trillionaire, but it also triggered a historic land grab in risky leveraged ETFs.
items.title_zh: 风险最高的 SpaceX 股票交易首周表现强劲
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 的 IPO 不仅创造了市场历史上最大的首次公开募股和万亿富翁，而且还引发了风险杠杆 ETF 的历史性抢滩。

items.title: US and Iran begin talks on initial peace deal in Switzerland
items.summary: The face-to-face meeting follows ongoing fighting in Lebanon and Iran's claim to have shut the Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗在瑞士开始就初步和平协议进行谈判
items.summary_zh: 此次面对面会议是在黎巴嫩持续战斗以及伊朗声称已关闭霍尔木兹海峡之后举行的。

items.title: Bitter Historical Feud Threatens Ukraine-Poland Alliance
items.summary: President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine signed a decree honoring World War II partisan fighters that has inflamed tensions with Warsaw.
items.title_zh: 苦涩的历史宿怨威胁着乌克兰与波兰的联盟
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰总统弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基签署了一项纪念二战游击队战士的法令，该法令加剧了与华沙的紧张关系。

items.title: The Women Running Businesses Under Taliban Rules
items.summary: With secondary education and most jobs out of reach, thousands of Afghan women have turned to entrepreneurship as the only path to make money and maintain a social life.
items.title_zh: 在塔利班规则下经营企业的女性
items.summary_zh: 由于中学教育和大多数工作都遥不可及，成千上万的阿富汗妇女转向创业，将其作为赚钱和维持社交生活的唯一途径。

items.title: Neither the War Nor Trump’s Deal Terminated the Main Threats in Iran, Analysts Say
items.summary: Neither the war nor the agreement terminated the main threats emanating from Iran, many analysts said.
items.title_zh: 分析人士称，战争和特朗普的协议都没有消除伊朗的主要威胁
items.summary_zh: 许多分析人士表示，战争和协议都没有消除来自伊朗的主要威胁。

items.title: Luxury Kushner Project Collides With Albanian Discontent
items.summary: Protests in Albania against plans for a luxury tourist site have become a cause célèbre for opponents of President Trump and his family. But the politics are local.
items.title_zh: 库什纳豪华项目与阿尔巴尼亚不满情绪发生冲突
items.summary_zh: 阿尔巴尼亚针对豪华旅游景点计划的抗议活动已成为特朗普总统及其家人的反对者的关注焦点。但政治是地方性的。

items.title: Microsoft found malware that hijacks crypto wallets and spreads through USB sticks
items.summary: The software intercepts shortcut files and directs them to install a worm that harvests private keys from the Windows clipboard and inserts its own destination wallet addresses when it detects a transfer.
items.title_zh: 微软发现恶意软件劫持加密钱包并通过 U 盘传播
items.summary_zh: 该软件拦截快捷方式文件并引导它们安装蠕虫病毒，该蠕虫病毒从 Windows 剪贴板获取私钥，并在检测到转账时插入自己的目标钱包地址。

items.title: Base targets June 25 mainnet launch for Beryl upgrade and new B20 token standard
items.summary: Base's Beryl upgrade introduces the B20 native token standard, cuts withdrawal delays to 5 days, and activates on mainnet June 25.
items.title_zh: Base 目标是在 6 月 25 日启动主网，进行 Beryl 升级和新的 B20 代币标准
items.summary_zh: Base 的 Beryl 升级引入了 B20 原生代币标准，将提款延迟缩短至 5 天，并于 6 月 25 日在主网上激活。

items.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
items.summary: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.
items.title_zh: 使用人工智能帮助医生诊断影响儿童的罕见遗传病
items.summary_zh: 研究人员使用 OpenAI 推理模型来帮助诊断罕见疾病，在之前未解决的病例中识别出了 18 种新的诊断结果。

items.title: From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot
items.title_zh: 从 Hugging Face Hub 到 Strands Agents 和 LeRobot 的机器人硬件

items.title: A better way to model the behavior of metal alloys
items.summary: MIT researchers’ approach captures subtle atomic patterns, improving predictions of material properties.
items.title_zh: 模拟金属合金行为的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院研究人员的方法捕捉微妙的原子模式，改善对材料特性的预测。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: A Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的一项研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Bitcoin's future as revolutionary as the smartphone, according to CoinDesk
items.summary: CoinDesk’s president of indices and data has a message for investors: Don’t count out bitcoin.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 表示，比特币的未来将像智能手机一样具有革命性
items.summary_zh: CoinDesk 的指数和数据总裁向投资者传达了一条信息：不要指望比特币。

items.title: AI is making crypto security cheaper, faster and harder to ignore
items.summary: As AI-powered security tools become cheaper, faster and more widely available, researchers said they could reshape what the crypto industry considers reasonable due diligence before deploying code, potentially altering expectations for developers and institutions.
items.title_zh: 人工智能正在使加密安全变得更便宜、更快、更难以忽视
items.summary_zh: 随着人工智能驱动的安全工具变得更便宜、更快、更广泛，研究人员表示，他们可以在部署代码之前重塑加密行业认为合理的尽职调查，这可能会改变对开发人员和机构的期望。

items.title: Charles Schwab is working with Cboe to launch S&P 500 ‘yes-or-no’ binary options contracts: WSJ
items.summary: The binary contracts would mark the brokerage's first move into prediction-market-style products, a sector that Kalshi and Polymarket already dominate.
items.title_zh: 嘉信理财正在与芝加哥期权交易所合作推出标准普尔 500 指数“是或否”二元期权合约：《华尔街日报》
items.summary_zh: 这些二元合约将标志着该经纪公司首次涉足预测市场式产品，而 Kalshi 和 Polymarket 已经在这一领域占据主导地位。

items.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
items.summary: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.
items.title_zh: 新的使用情况分析和更新的企业支出控制
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 为 ChatGPT Enterprise 引入了新的支出控制和使用分析，帮助组织充满信心地管理成本并扩展 AI。

items.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.
items.title_zh: 近乎自主的人工智能化学家改善了药物化学中具有挑战性的反应
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Molecule.one 展示了一位近乎自主的 AI 化学家如何使用 GPT-5.4 改进关键的制药反应，从而推进药物化学研究。

items.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
items.summary: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.
items.title_zh: LifeSciBench 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 LifeSciBench，这是一个由专家撰写、专家评审的基准，用于评估人工智能系统如何处理现实世界的生命科学研究任务和决策。

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
items.title_zh: 通过模拟部署来预测发布前的模型行为
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 引入了部署模拟，这是一种在部署前使用真实对话数据预测 AI 模型行为的方法，以提高安全性和评估准确性。

items.title: MosaicLeaks: Can your research agent keep a secret?
items.title_zh: MosaicLeaks：你的研究代理人能保守秘密吗？

items.title: Is it agentic enough? Benchmarking open models on your own tooling
items.title_zh: 是否足够代理？在您自己的工具上对开放模型进行基准测试

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: In game theory, generalists sometimes win out over specialists
items.summary: Researchers show that for certain kinds of games, an overlooked class of algorithms performs much better than expected.
items.title_zh: 在博弈论中，通才有时会战胜专家
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表明，对于某些类型的游戏，一类被忽视的算法的表现比预期要好得多。

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The average SpaceX buyer post-IPO is almost under water after two-day slide
items.summary: Shares of SpaceX fell as much as 7% Thursday to $178, leaving the stock trading roughly in line with its volume-weighted average price of just under $180.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股后的平均买家在经历了两天的下滑后几乎陷入困境
items.summary_zh: 周四，SpaceX 股价下跌 7%，至 178 美元，该股交易价格大致与其略低于 180 美元的成交量加权平均价格一致。

items.title: Fuel sales halted in occupied Crimea as Ukraine targets oil facilities
items.summary: Fuel had already been rationed due to shortages caused by Kyiv's attacks against supply routes in Russian-occupied territories.
items.title_zh: 由于乌克兰袭击石油设施，被占领的克里米亚的燃料销售停止
items.summary_zh: 由于基辅对俄罗斯占领区供应路线的袭击造成燃料短缺，燃料已经实行配给。

items.title: Nobel Peace Prize winner triumphs at Ethiopian polls but fears grow of new conflict
items.summary: Abiy Ahmed's party retains its huge majority despite unrest in several parts of Ethiopia and tensions with its neighbours.
items.title_zh: 诺贝尔和平奖获得者在埃塞俄比亚民意调查中获胜，但人们越来越担心新的冲突
items.summary_zh: 尽管埃塞俄比亚多个地区发生骚乱且与邻国关系紧张，但阿比·艾哈迈德的政党仍保有绝大多数席位。

items.title: Colombia's escalating, brutal internal conflict is defining its presidential election
items.summary: A left-wing senator who backs talks with armed gangs faces an outsider endorsed by Trump.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚不断升级的残酷内部冲突正在决定其总统选举
items.summary_zh: 一位支持与武装团伙谈判的左翼参议员面临着特朗普支持的局外人。

items.title: Former Olympian denies vandalising Washington Reflecting Pool after arrest
items.summary: Davey Hearn says he was simply touching the new paint at the site out of curiosity and did not remove or alter it.
items.title_zh: 前奥运选手被捕后否认破坏华盛顿倒影池
items.summary_zh: 戴维·赫恩 (Davey Hearn) 表示，他只是出于好奇而触摸现场的新油漆，并没有移除或改变它。

items.title: Tight security as Indian students resit medical exam after alleged paper leak
items.summary: Millions of candidates face biometric checks and frisking as air force deployed to secure exam papers.
items.title_zh: 印度学生因涉嫌试卷泄露而重新接受体检，安保严密
items.summary_zh: 由于部署了空军来保护试卷，数百万考生面临生物识别检查和搜身。

items.title: Israeli strikes kill six people in Gaza including Al Jazeera cameraman, officials say
items.summary: The Israeli military accused Ahmed Wishah of being a "Hamas sniper operative", without providing evidence.
items.title_zh: 官员称，以色列空袭导致加沙六人死亡，其中包括半岛电视台摄影师
items.summary_zh: 以色列军方指责艾哈迈德·维沙是“哈马斯狙击手”，但没有提供证据。

items.title: Low-key funeral held for giant of the art world David Hockney
items.summary: The artist, who passed away at his home in London earlier this month, requested just his partner and great-nephew attend.
items.title_zh: 艺术界巨人大卫·霍克尼低调葬礼
items.summary_zh: 这位本月早些时候在伦敦家中去世的艺术家只要求他的伴侣和侄孙参加。

items.title: Dutch royals enjoy two big results in one World Cup day
items.summary: There may be about 5,000 miles between the Netherlands and their former colony Curacao but members of the Dutch royal family managed to see both sides play on Saturday.
items.title_zh: 荷兰皇室在世界杯的一天内取得了两项重大成果
items.summary_zh: 荷兰与其前殖民地库拉索岛之间可能相距约 5,000 英里，但荷兰王室成员设法观看了双方周六的比赛。

items.title: New Round of U.S.-Iran Talks Is Underway in Switzerland
items.summary: An American delegation, led by Vice President JD Vance, was attending the talks along with Iranian negotiators.
items.title_zh: 新一轮美伊会谈在瑞士进行
items.summary_zh: 由副总统万斯率领的美国代表团与伊朗谈判代表一起参加了会谈。

items.title: Keir Starmer Reflects on ‘Political Challenges’ as Pressure to Resign Mounts
items.summary: An ally of Keir Starmer’s told the BBC on Sunday that Mr. Starmer was “taking the time to think through what the political realities are today compared to last week.”
items.title_zh: 凯尔·斯塔默 (Keir Starmer) 反思辞职压力增大带来的“政治挑战”
items.summary_zh: 凯尔·斯塔默的一位盟友周日告诉英国广播公司，斯塔默先生“正在花时间思考与上周相比今天的政治现实。”

items.title: Colombia’s High-Stakes Election: What to Know About the Candidates, Issues and Expected Results
items.summary: Colombia’s election on Sunday pits a right-wing candidate endorsed by President Trump against a candidate promising continuity with the country’s departing leftist president.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚高风险选举：关于候选人、问题和预期结果的了解
items.summary_zh: 哥伦比亚周日的选举将由特朗普总统支持的右翼候选人与承诺与该国即将离任的左翼总统保持连续性的候选人对决。

items.title: Wife of Spanish Prime Minister to Stand Trial for Corruption
items.summary: Begoña Gómez faces charges of embezzlement, corruption, misappropriation of funds and influence peddling for helping favored companies win public contracts.
items.title_zh: 西班牙首相夫人因腐败受审
items.summary_zh: 贝戈尼亚·戈麦斯因帮助受青睐的公司赢得公共合同而面临贪污、腐败、挪用资金和以权谋私的指控。

items.title: Father and Uncle of Slain New York Girl Given Life Sentences in Pakistan
items.summary: The killing of the victim, a 14-year-old girl from Yonkers who was known for posting videos on TikTok, was premeditated, a court ruled.
items.title_zh: 被害纽约女孩的父亲和叔叔在巴基斯坦被判无期徒刑
items.summary_zh: 法院裁定，受害者是一名来自扬克斯的 14 岁女孩，因在 TikTok 上发布视频而闻名，她的遇害是有预谋的。

items.title: After Andy Burnham’s Win, the UK Is Set to Test How Far Charisma Can Shift Electoral Dynamics
items.summary: The governing Labour Party may oust Prime Minister Keir Starmer in favor of the more popular Andy Burnham — who will still face all the same challenges.
items.title_zh: 安迪·伯纳姆获胜后，英国将测试魅力能在多大程度上改变选举动态
items.summary_zh: 执政的工党可能会罢免首相基尔·斯塔默，转而支持更受欢迎的安迪·伯纳姆——他仍将面临所有同样的挑战。

items.title: Schwab to join prediction markets race with S&P 500 event-based options: WSJ
items.summary: The planned offering would let customers bet on index moves as Coinbase and Robinhood expand in the sector.
items.title_zh: 施瓦布将加入预测市场与标准普尔 500 指数基于事件的期权的竞赛：《华尔街日报》
items.summary_zh: 随着 Coinbase 和 Robinhood 在该领域的扩张，计划中的产品将让客户押注指数走势。

items.title: Digital credit market hit by huge selloff as Strive CEO blames leverage liquidations
items.summary: Matt Cole says forced selling from leveraged investors pushed STRC and SATA sharply lower before both rebounded.
items.title_zh: Strive首席执行官指责杠杆清算，数字信贷市场遭受巨大抛售
items.summary_zh: 马特·科尔 (Matt Cole) 表示，杠杆投资者的强制抛售导致 STRC 和 SATA 大幅下跌，然后两者均出现反弹。

items.title: Notorious ‘jaredfromsubway’ MEV bot drained for roughly $7.5 million in counter-MEV honeypot
items.summary: An X account using the bot's name claimed a $15 million loss and offered a $1 million bounty, but evidence shows it is a likely impersonator.
items.title_zh: 臭名昭著的“jaredfromsubway”MEV 机器人在反 MEV 蜜罐中损失了约 750 万美元
items.summary_zh: 一个使用该机器人名称的 X 帐户声称损失了 1500 万美元，并悬赏 100 万美元，但有证据表明它很可能是冒充者。

items.title: Secret Network’s Axelar bridge drained for $4.67 million in infinite-mint exploit that went unnoticed for seven days
items.summary: Secret Network says about $770,000 of the stolen funds still sits in the attacker's Axelar wallet, and that Axelar declined its request to freeze it.
items.title_zh: Secret Network 的 Axelar 桥因无限铸币漏洞而被耗尽 467 万美元，该漏洞在 7 天内未被注意到
items.summary_zh: Secret Network 表示，大约 77 万美元的被盗资金仍然存在于攻击者的 Axelar 钱包中，但 Axelar 拒绝了冻结资金的请求。

items.title: Andre Cronje, two others resign from Sonic Labs board as S token trades 97% below its peak
items.summary: Sonic Labs said the three "remain invested in Sonic's success" but will no longer make business decisions for the Layer 1 network, formerly Fantom.
items.title_zh: 由于 S 代币交易价格比峰值低 97%，Andre Cronje 和另外两人从 Sonic Labs 董事会辞职
items.summary_zh: Sonic Labs 表示，三人“仍将投资于 Sonic 的成功”，但将不再为 Layer 1 网络（前身为 Fantom）做出业务决策。

items.title: TD Cowen says CME has the upper hand in lawsuit against CFTC over crypto perpetual futures
items.summary: "We expect CME will seek a preliminary injunction to block perps as the case proceeds," said TD Cowen's Jaret Seiberg.
items.title_zh: TD Cowen 表示，CME 在针对 CFTC 的加密永续期货诉讼中占据上风
items.summary_zh: TD Cowen 的 Jaret Seiberg 表示：“我们预计，随着案件的进展，CME 将寻求初步禁令来阻止犯罪分子。”

items.title: Two Texas brothers admit to $8 million crypto robbery after holding family at gunpoint, face up to 20 years in prison
items.summary: Brothers Isiah and Raymond Garcia pleaded guilty to an armed $8 million crypto robbery and kidnapping in Minnesota.
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州两兄弟持枪威胁家人，承认盗窃 800 万美元加密货币，面临最高 20 年监禁
items.summary_zh: Isiah 和 Raymond Garcia 兄弟承认在明尼苏达州武装抢劫和绑架价值 800 万美元的加密货币。

items.title: ‘Most difficult day in the history of digital credit’: Strive CEO says leverage liquidation drove STRC and SATA selloff
items.summary: STRC and SATA, designed to trade near a $100 par value, fell significantly on Thursday before partially recovering.
items.title_zh: “数字信贷历史上最困难的一天”：Strive首席执行官表示杠杆清算推动了STRC和SATA的抛售
items.summary_zh: STRC 和 SATA 的交易价格接近 100 美元面值，周四大幅下跌，随后部分回升。

items.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.

items.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
items.summary: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Ona
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 计划收购 Ona，以通过安全、持久的云环境扩展 Codex，从而实现跨企业工作流程长期运行的 AI 代理。

items.summary: The fellowships in applied sciences, engineering, and mathematics recognize doctoral students who are pursuing solutions to the most pressing challenges in science and technology.
